title: AN ACT RENAMING PANGLAO ISLAND CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD TRAVERSING BARANGAYS TANGNAN, BIL-ISAN, LOOC, POBLACION, DANAO, TAWALA, BOLOD AND LIBAONG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANGLAO AND BARANGAY TOTOLAN, SONGCULAN, TABALONG, BINGAG, DAO, SAN ISIDRO, BIKING 1, BIKING 2, CATARMAN, MAYACABAC, POBLACION AND UNION IN THEMUNICIPALITY OF DAUIS, AS ANOS FONACIER CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD (DAUIS-PANGLAO)

chunks.text:
114 OG No. 38, 6598 (September 17, 2018); Manila Bulletin, September 6, 2018

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11064, August 23, 2018 ]

AN ACT RENAMING PANGLAO ISLAND CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD TRAVERSING BARANGAYS TANGNAN, BIL-ISAN, LOOC, POBLACION, DANAO, TAWALA, BOLOD AND LIBAONG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANGLAO AND BARANGAY TOTOLAN, SONGCULAN, TABALONG, BINGAG, DAO, SAN ISIDRO, BIKING 1, BIKING 2, CATARMAN, MAYACABAC, POBLACION AND UNION IN THEMUNICIPALITY OF DAUIS, AS ANOS FONACIER CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD (DAUIS-PANGLAO)

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In recognition of the remarkable achievements and contributions of the late Anos Fonacier in the development of Bohol's tourism, the Panglao Island Circumferential Road which traverses barangays Tangnan, Bil-isan, Looc, Poblacion, Danao, Tawala, Bolod and Libaong in the Municipality of Panglao and barangays Totolan, Songculan, Tabalong, Bingag, dao, San Isidro, Biking 1, Biking 2, Catarman, Mayacabac, Poblacion and Union in the Municipality of Dauis, is hereby renamed as Anos Fonacier Circumferential Road (Dauis-Panglao).

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways is hereby directed to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in any newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

PANTALEON D. ALVAREZ

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 13, 2017 and March 12, 2018,respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

CESAR STRAIT PAREJA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 23 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Senate
